title: クライマックス3戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: A pleasure to see you again! Etsuko Otonashi from Twinkle Monthly here. Would you happen to be free right now?
choice_data_list: Why so formal all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I thought it would be appropriate, given
this is the last race and all.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...It's finally time. This race will decide the
greatest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I've waited so impatiently for this, but it also
makes me a little sad... It's a strange feeling.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I didn't mean to put a damper on such a
big moment! Right, I need to collect myself and
conduct this interview!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: As the trainer of a leading contender for the title of greatest Umamusume, what's your outlook as we approach the final race?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roar from the crowd is deafening. It's almost
time for the fanfare to ring out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The title of "greatest" will be decided right here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What's your outlook as we approach the final
race?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roar from the crowd is deafening. It's almost
time for the fanfare to ring out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to watch over <chrname>
right until the very end. In my mind at least, she's
already the greatest!
